name: Good first issue
about: A beginner-friendly task for new contributors
title: '[GOOD FIRST ISSUE] '
labels: good first issue
assignees: ''
---

## What you'll work on

Brief description of the task.

## Why this is a good first issue

- [ ] Clear scope and well-defined goal
- [ ] Does not require deep knowledge of the codebase
- [ ] Can be completed in a few hours
- [ ] Maintainers will provide guidance

## What you need to know

- Basic Python knowledge
- Familiarity with [specific skill, e.g., pytest, pandas, etc.]
- No prior physics knowledge required (unless specified)

## Steps to complete

1. [ ] Fork the repository and set up the development environment (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
2. [ ] Make your changes
3. [ ] Run tests: `python -m pytest tests/`
4. [ ] Submit a pull request

## Need help?

- Drop a comment on this issue
- Join our [Discussions](https://github.com/Houchen181/cm-expert-llm/discussions)
- Check out existing PRs for examples

## Resources

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Development Setup Guide](../docs/SETUP.md)
- [Code Style Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style)

**Note to maintainers**: Please ensure this issue has:
- [ ] Clear acceptance criteria
- [ ] Point of contact for questions
- [ ] Estimated time to complete
- [ ] Relevant file paths/code references
